channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Rewrite your backend for 5G users before they do
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 56%: proxy, payload truncation, and the 5G metrics that expose hidden costs

item.title: Negotiate remote salaries below $50k in 3 calls
item.description: Land $70k remote roles from lower-cost countries: PPP math, anchor scripts, and the exact emails that got me $65k average — client objections, equity tricks, and when to walk away.

item.title: Vector DBs: when to use them (and when to skip)
item.description: Cut vector search latency from 60 ms to 8 ms and halve ingestion time with a simple schema change. Compare pgvector, Qdrant, and ClickHouse VectorIndex on real workloads and pick the right tool before you migrate.

item.title: Freelance rates that pay in 2024
item.description: Freelance developers leave $40k on the table yearly with wrong rates. Use the 2024 rate calculator to set floor, target, and premium rates with real metrics—benchmarks, client budgets, and risk adjustments included.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines like a pro
item.description: Cut AI pipeline debugging time by 70% with structured observability. Learn exactly what to log, trace, and alert on when your system includes an LLM — with Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, and Grafana.

item.title: Skip zero-trust’s checkboxes: small teams need this
item.description: Cut zero-trust setup time from months to days with a JWT gate at the edge — real latency numbers, cost deltas, and the security controls that actually matter for small teams. Zero-trust architecture for small teams: what actually makes sense to implement.

item.title: Pick the right dev platform in 5 minutes
item.description: Cut sandbox latency by 60% when choosing a dev platform in Africa — Andela vs Toptal vs Arc with real latency data, cost per hour, and hire-to-prod timelines for Lagos fintechs in 2026.

item.title: Monoliths are back in 2026 — and this time they're
item.description: Cut infra costs 40% and latency from 1.8s to 8ms — monoliths are back in 2026 and this is the exact stack to use for your budget tier

item.title: Measure LLM pipelines: 4 critical metrics to track
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline costs by 42% and latency by 71% with 4 critical metrics — prompt tags, retriever distance, token counters, and post-process flags. Production-grade tracing, Prometheus dashboards, and replay tests included.

item.title: Fix 5G backend bugs before users do
item.description: Cut mobile API timeouts by 83% with 5G-aware streaming, connection pooling, and observability — the exact steps teams used to fix slowness before users complained.

item.title: AI multiplies dev power: the real split between senior
item.description: ster with 40% fewer bugs. Juniors delivered with AI multiplies dev power — understanding the codebase just amplified their mi.

item.title: Tech salaries 2026: a cold shower
item.description: Tech salaries in 2026 will rise 30–50% for AI core roles but flatline for legacy systems — real numbers from real systems, with comp benchmarks and the mistakes that break the hype

item.title: Vibe coding burns prod: hard numbers
item.description: Cut p99 latency 96% and AWS costs 82% after vibe coding melted prod — here’s what to instrument first in FastAPI, Python 3.11, and the hidden AST/GC costs nobody mentions.

item.title: Pick the right dev platform in 5 mins
item.description: ium is 25–30% above market. Toptal’s contra with Pick dev platform mins — cancel the contract.

item.description: eak, with 95% p99 latency under 80 ms. We u with Cut cloud carbon slowing — solve) In late 2023, we were running a real-time ge.

item.title: Land $4k remote roles: GitHub README portfolio
item.description: Land $4,000 remote roles by shipping a CLI tool with caching and logging — latency benchmarks, GitHub Actions CI, and README template included for Nairobi and Lagos devs.

item.title: M-Pesa vs Flutterwave vs Paystack: pick the right
item.description: Cut webhook latency 60% and save 3 weeks of dev time choosing between M-Pesa, Flutterwave, and Paystack — real benchmarks, real costs, and the integration mistakes most teams make.

item.title: Pick FastAPI or Django REST: the real trade-offs
item.description: FastAPI beats Django REST in latency by 60% at 25k rpm but costs $8/month less on AWS — real AWS bills, connection leaks, and the unexpected coupling that surprised teams in Nairobi fintech stacks

item.title: Find Node.js memory leaks in 10 min
item.description: Cut Node.js memory leaks in half in 24 hours with heap snapshots and event listener audits — real causes, fixes, and the tooling most teams miss.

item.title: Run LLMs locally today
item.description: s already 80% full when they try to install with LLMs — load, then get a CUDA out-of-memory error when they.
